posts.name: PollyReach
posts.tagline: Give your agent a real number and voice to make calls.
posts.description: Most AI phone tools are built for enterprises — APIs, workflows, sales automation. PollyReach is built for you. Give your AI a real phone number. Say "book me a table for 7pm" — it finds the number, makes the call, handles the conversation, and reports back with a summary, recording & transcript. It also answers your phone 24/7 and screens spam. Works in 50+ languages.

posts.name: Drizz
posts.tagline: Mobile tests that write, run, and fix themselves
posts.description: Drizz is an AI-powered mobile test automation platform built around intent-based testing. Simply describe what you want to test in plain English, Drizz executes it on a real device using Vision AI and automatically authors a reusable test case. No scripting, no flaky selectors, no manual maintenance. It adapts to dynamic UIs, integrates with your CI/CD pipeline, and gives your team reliable end-to-end coverage without the overhead.

posts.name: Composer 2.5
posts.tagline: Cursor’s most powerful model yet
posts.description: A substantial improvement in intelligence and behavior over Composer 2, particularly on long-horizon agentic tasks.

posts.name: Mantle Chat
posts.tagline: Collaboration platform where teams work with AI together
posts.description: Mantle Chat helps teams boost productivity and adopt AI faster by bringing real-time messaging, AI model chats, autonomous agents, and tool integrations into one shared workspace. Communicate in Discord/Slack-style channels, mention AI agents and models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Deepseek) with @ whenever you need help directly in conversations with teammates, build agents, run autonomous tasks together, and connect 30+ tools (Notion, Linear, Gmail and more) your team already uses.

posts.name: CtrlOps
posts.tagline: Deploy, Debug & Manage Linux Servers with AI.
posts.description: Most devs manage servers from a spreadsheet of IPs and commands nobody remembers. CtrlOps gives you AI-powered server management without DevOps expertise. AI terminal that generates commands with your approval. Scripts library. One-click deploys from any GitHub repo. Visual file manager. Real-time server monitoring. Zero agents on servers. Deployments that took 60 minutes now take 5. 100% local. Your credentials never leave your machine. Mac. Windows. Linux.

posts.name: Motion
posts.tagline: A video agent for tasteful motion design
posts.description: Motion is a frontier video agent for tasteful motion design. Give it a prompt with links, X threads, videos, assets, or references. Motion researches, storyboards, and creates explainers, launch videos, logo animations, or motion design for existing videos. Then edit everything directly: resize, drag and drop, modify elements, or iterate with chat.

posts.name: Chert
posts.tagline: Build AI agents that text customers in iMessage
posts.description: Build and deploy conversational iMessage agents for customer service, inbound lead capture, and more. Simply configure the system prompt and tone, and you can create your own conversational iMessage agent for inbound handling, outbound follow-up, or whatever workflow you want to test. You can also integrate with CRMs like HubSpot, Close, or GoHighLevel to write back conversation histories.

posts.name: Monocle 3.5 for macOS
posts.tagline: Noise-cancelling for your  screen
posts.description: Monocle 3.5 is a crucial follow-up to 3.0, and the one most asked for. With those long-awaited features finally in, the app just clicks. It feels complete.

posts.name: Voker
posts.tagline: The Agent Analytics Platform for AI Product Teams
posts.description: Voker is the Agent Analytics Platform for AI product teams. It gives you the usage behavior and agent performance insights you need to monitor and optimize your production agents at scale. Install the lightweight, provider agnostic SDK and Voker handles the rest: automatic intent, correction and resolution detection on your user to agent interactions, conversation reconstructions, queryable timelines, agent performance tracking so you can build the best agents possible.

posts.name: Insights by Omnia
posts.tagline: Step-by-step action plans to improve your AI visibility.
posts.description: Omnia Insights turns any prompt you track into a prioritized action plan to improve your visibility in AI engines. Each plan includes impact level, why it matters, how to implement, and the citation gaps to close.

posts.name: imgproxy v4
posts.tagline: A fast and secure self-hosted image processing server
posts.description: imgproxy is a fast and secure standalone server for resizing, processing, and converting images. The guiding principles behind imgproxy are speed, security, and simplicity. It is well equipped to handle huge volumes of image-processing requests with ease. imgproxy is a drop-in replacement for all the image-processing code in your web application. With imgproxy, you don’t need to repeatedly re-prepare images to fit your design every time it changes, as imgproxy does this on demand.

posts.name: Haystack
posts.tagline: Review the pull requests that actually need human attention
posts.description: Haystack helps engineering teams manage the growing volume of AI-generated pull requests. It sits on top of GitHub, analyzes each PR’s diff, codebase context, agent trace, intent, and verification evidence, then routes it: safe to move forward, needs fixes, or needs human review. Teams use Haystack to keep code moving without rubber-stamping, focusing human attention where judgment actually matters.

posts.name: ShioriCode
posts.tagline: Open-source alternative to Codex & Claude Code
posts.description: A desktop interface for the coding-agent CLIs you already use — Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini, Kimi, and a hosted Shiori provider. Run long-running sessions with project-aware threads, stream agent activity into a readable timeline, and review generated diffs without leaving the app. Source-available, built for work that doesn't fit in one prompt.

posts.name: Starchild-1 by Odyssey
posts.tagline: The first real-time multimodal world model
posts.description: Starchild-1 is the first real-time multimodal world model that generates synchronized audio + video while responding live to user input. Built for interactive AI, gaming, robotics, education, and beyond, bringing us closer to truly immersive world intelligence.

posts.name: AutoShelf
posts.tagline: Auto-organize files on your Mac
posts.description: AutoShelf is a macOS app that watches your folders and auto-organizes files. Set a rule once and never think about it again. Free to try, unlock unlimited for $19.99.

posts.name: LearnHouse
posts.tagline: The modern way to teach what you build
posts.description: LearnHouse is an open-source learning platform to teach your users everything about your product. Built for builders who ship great things but need their users to actually understand them. v1.0 is our first stable release - packed with AI, code execution, discussions, analytics, and everything you'd expect from modern developer tooling. Self-host it or use our cloud. Either way, your content, your data, your community.

posts.name: Hanami
posts.tagline: A daily meditation with Japanese art
posts.description: Hanami pairs you with one Japanese masterwork every morning from a thousand years of Japanese art history. The collection grows weekly. The whole experience is built to feel like a private morning visit to a museum — slow, intentional, no clutter. Each work comes with curator-voiced audio narration and quiet editorial context. Curated journeys move through movements: The Floating World (ukiyo-e), The Rinpa School, Kabuki Theater, Flowers Birds Stillness. iOS only. Built solo from Toronto.

posts.name: Papr Graph
posts.tagline: Upgrade to graph-native vector embeddings
posts.description: Papr Graph transforms semantic embeddings into graph-native embeddings with one API call. It encodes temporal, topical, and other dimensions within any embedding, helping agents retrieve answers based on correctness, not just semantic closeness.

posts.name: Thinnest AI
posts.tagline: Build Voice AI Agents in 100+ languages for ₹1.5/min
posts.description: ThinnestAI is programmable voice AI infrastructure for building human-like AI phone agents at scale. → 100+ languages with seamless multilingual conversations. → Bring your own LLM, STT, TTS, and telephony providers. → Native SIP, Twilio, and workflow integrations. → No-code flow builder with RAG knowledge bases and MCP support. → Real-time voice agents for support, sales, onboarding, and operations. Start building AI voice agents in minutes — no credit card required.

posts.name: Trainer
posts.tagline: Train AI agents by recording your screen
posts.description: Trainer lets you train AI agents by simply recording a task once. No prompts, no labeled data. It captures every click, keystroke, and intent as you work, then turns that workflow into a reusable agent that can repeat the process reliably. Built for automating real-world tasks through demonstration instead of manual configuration, making AI agents practical and accessible for everyday work.

posts.name: CaseGap AI
posts.tagline: Find law firm revenue leaks, then fix them
posts.description: CaseGap AI helps law firms find and fix revenue leaks across SEO, local search, AI visibility, reviews, speed, and compliance. Run a 60-second audit to get a prioritized action plan, then deploy an AI marketing agent to work daily on the fixes: SEO updates, Google Business posts, review responses, outreach, directory improvements, and ad copy.

posts.name: calog.cc
posts.tagline: Chat-based calorie tracker that actually knows desi food
posts.description: Most calorie apps fail with desi food. Search "roti" — wrong results. Qeema doesn't exist. Chai calories are way off. calog.cc fixes this. Type what you ate or snap a photo — AI estimates calories, protein and macros instantly. No food database. No forms. Just chat. Pre-loaded with Pakistani food. Tracks workouts too. Weekly fat loss chart to stay consistent. Free. No credit card. Works on mobile. Try without signing up https://calog.cc/try

posts.name: Vocabi
posts.tagline: Translate, save & memorize words while you read
posts.description: Most people look up a word and forget it by tomorrow. Vocabi fixes that. Hover over any word while reading → translation appears. Click Save → goes to your dictionary. Open Flashcards → spaced repetition does the rest. → Works on any website → 10 languages supported → No account. Works offline. Private by default. Built for language learners who actually read.

posts.name: VWFNDR™ + MBL
posts.tagline: Take raw photos with proof they're real, not AI
posts.description: VWFNDR™ + MBL is a free Android camera built around real photographic capture: unprocessed Bayer RAW DNG and JPEG simultaneously, variable aspect ratios, priority modes, manual controls on a single screen, and C2PA Content Credentials embedded at capture, a tamper-evident proof that every photo was taken by a real camera, not generated or constructed.

posts.name: Agora-1 by Odyssey
posts.tagline: A multi-agent world model you can play
posts.description: Agora-1 by Odyssey is a playable research preview of a multi-agent world model. Up to four humans or AI agents can share and interact inside the same real-time generated GoldenEye-style simulation.

posts.name: Buggyverse
posts.tagline: Study with strangers online, high-accountability focus rooms
posts.description: Buggyverse is a live coworking home designed to replace the isolation of remote work with genuine human connection. While many platforms focus on passive broadcasts, we built a space centered on active interaction. This is a place where you don’t just log in to work; you come to find your people. Whether it is sharing music or staying locked in for an 8 hour school day, Buggyverse is for friendships that last years. Join us and belong.

posts.name: Cosmic Insights
posts.tagline: Cookieless web analytics built into your CMS
posts.description: Most CMS + analytics setups are two systems duct-taped together. You ship content, then squint at a separate dashboard trying to match slugs to posts. Cosmic Insights fixes that. Cookieless web analytics built directly into Cosmic. Every pageview, session, and revenue event is attributed to the exact CMS object that produced it. One script tag. No cookies. No banners. GDPR-friendly by default. Included free on every plan.

posts.name: Lyricly
posts.tagline: Live lyrics in your dynamic Notch & floating on your desktop
posts.description: Most music apps live in a window. Lyricly brings your music out of it — onto your screen, into your flow. So instead of switching tabs, your music stays with you. • Dynamic Notch player with smooth, interactive controls • Real-time synced lyrics that feel alive • Desktop floating lyrics that sit above everything • Menu bar lyrics for a minimal setup Works with Apple Music and Spotify. Built for people who keep music on all day.

posts.name: CLI Market
posts.tagline: 3,760 retailers, one API for AI agents
posts.description: 3,760+ retailers VTEX en 67 países y 12 líneas de negocio. API REST, CLI y 12 herramientas MCP para agentes de IA. Open source: pip install cli-market. 12 MCP tools. Busca, compara y compra desde la terminal.

posts.name: YOSA
posts.tagline: Generate SEO optimized, brand-tailored content that ranks
posts.description: YOSA is a content tool working just like your personal content crew. Research, brief, writing, SEO review - the same workflow agencies use, fully automated. From topic idea or keyword to publish-ready copy in a few minutes. We built this after 15 years of hands-on experience with content creation in our SEO agency. YOSA learns your brand, runs research, digs through Google SERPs and AI responses, scans what has been already said on your website and generates content that ranks.

posts.name: WowOptions
posts.tagline: Boost Shopify sales with custom product options & upsells
posts.description: Most Shopify stores lose sales because product customization feels limited and confusing. WowOptions helps merchants create flexible custom product options, variant options, swatches, file uploads, and add-on pricing without coding. Build better buying experiences with conditional logic, reusable option sets, and unlimited product customization that helps increase conversions and boost average order value naturally.

posts.name: Ryplix Studio
posts.tagline: Improve your App Store listing with AI screenshots and ASO.
posts.description: Ryplix Studio is a platform designed to enhance App Store listings and drive app growth for enabling developers, mobile teams, and marketers to research keyword opportunities, refine store copy, and generate compelling App Store screenshots. - Create polished screenshot sets that align with user search queries and growth strategies. - Analyze keyword demand, competition, relevance, and ranking positions to inform listing optimization.

posts.name: Tooling Studio MCP
posts.tagline: Connect AI tools directly to your CRM and task management
posts.description: Your CRM has stale data. Your Kanban board is behind. Every time a call ends or an email lands, someone has to manually update the record, or it never gets done. Tooling Studio MCP connects Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other AI chat apps directly to your Sales CRM and Kanban Tasks inside Google Workspace. Describe what needs to happen in plain language, and your AI handles the rest. Both tools. One conversation. No new app, no migration.

posts.name: FluoTest
posts.tagline: Score any decision. Automate what happens next.
posts.description: Score any decision and automate what happens next. Build a scoring quiz for lead qualification, hiring, intake forms, or assessments. All features are currently free.

posts.name: SecuriX
posts.tagline: Trust Layer for Autonomous AI
posts.description: The Agent Access Security Broker (AASB). Connect Claude, ChatGPT, and custom AI agents/Chatbots to Jira, Slack, and Notion, GMail, Zoho Mail without leaking tokens or losing IT control.

posts.name: Veln — every package, verified
posts.tagline: Block bad npm and pip packages. Before they download.
posts.description: Over 20 trust signals score every npm and pip install — CVEs, maintainer drift, install scripts, hidden payloads. Bad packages refused befoSupply chain attacks on npm and PyPI keep landing in production — usually hours before any threat feed catches up. Veln is a local proxy that scores every install against 20+ trust signals (CVEs, maintainer changes, install scripts, hidden payloads) before a single byte hits your disk. Same commands, same lockfiles, zero workflow change.

posts.name: Trainer Gym AI

posts.name: Flint
posts.tagline: Build smarter lead tools that deliver instant value
posts.description: Flint lets you build AI-powered quizzes, product recommenders, service suggesters, and quote calculators that capture qualified leads and deliver instant, personalized results. Describe your use case to the Assistant, import your knowledge base, and publish an on-brand tool in minutes, no code required. Flint embeds on your site/hosted page, integrates with Mailchimp, Slack, and webhooks, and includes rich analytics. Every submission is sent directly to your CRM with detailed, structured data.

posts.name: Starter Bundle for Notion
posts.tagline: Start Engineering Your Life
posts.description: Start Engineering Your Life Most people treat their personal growth like a series of "to-do" lists. They track their workouts in a notebook, their habits on an app, and their finances in their head. This is what I call Life-Entropy. I’ve built the Notion Starter Bundle to serve as your entry point into a world of total alignment. This isn't just a collection of templates, it’s the "Initial Framework" I use to help my clients move from disorder to clarity.

posts.name: DynoWeb

posts.name: Mazori

posts.name: Keypup Gen AI

Just ask questions about your Git, ADO, Jira data & more. - Active Diagnosis: We don't just visualize data; our AI actively pinpoints delivery bottlenecks. - Prescriptive Fixes: The agent prescribes actionable solutions and monitors team improvement. posts.name: SideDoor Tasks

Your tasks still live in Reminders. No new account, no analytics, no separate database, no subscription.

posts.name: Phrasing.app

posts.name: Glass Apps

posts.description: A community catalog of apps, games and experiences for Meta smart glasses with a display.

posts.name: Devloot.xyz - Monetize Github issues

Featuring a Model Context Protocol (MCP) API, agents can scan, claim, and solve tasks programmatically.

posts.name: Sortio

Now adds: AI Rule Builder (plain-English rules compiled to deterministic actions), Watch Folders with scheduled runs, semantic search by meaning not filename, full undo and audit log, and a local-first mode that runs entirely offline via Ollama or LM Studio. Reads PDFs to extract vendor, date, and amount, then auto-renames (e.g., 20260514 Acme $1,240.pdf). Mac, Windows, Linux. Free tier: 10 AI credits. Pro: $99/year (30% off on launch day). Team Pro: $29/seat.

posts.name: Playgram - Multi-LLM workspace for teams
posts.tagline: Unlimited AI workspace for your entire team for $100/month.
posts.description: Tired of hitting AI limits? Playgram Unlimited gives your entire team unrestricted access to Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok & DeepSeek and mote for just $100/month flat. One workspace, shared memory, auto-picks the best model for each task. No per-seat pricing, no usage caps, no mid-task walls.

posts.name: FishSignals 2.0
posts.tagline: Live Data for commercial fishing
posts.description: More data for fishermen!

posts.name: fluos

Perfect for startups explaining their product, marketers who need fast social content, and agencies looking to scale motion production without scaling headcount. Currently in closed beta.

From $99/month. 📞 Try the live demo: call +12409733863

posts.name: Understand Anything
posts.tagline: Onboard to any codebase in minutes, not weeks.
posts.description: Understand Anything is an open-source project with 15k+ GitHub stars. It turns any repo into an interactive knowledge graph you can navigate, search, and learn from. Explore codebase maps, guided tours, file-level walkthroughs, and inline code reading. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, and opencode via slash commands. No vendor lock-in.

posts.name: Callen AI
posts.tagline: AI receptionist that answers every business call 24/7

Try free — no credit card needed 🚀

posts.name: Peliqan MCP Server

posts.description: Stop deploying a separate MCP server for every SaaS app. Peliqan gives Claude, ChatGPT and Cursor read+write access to 250+ apps via one endpoint, backed by a cached warehouse so AI has instant access to your ERP, CRM or any SaaS data. posts.name: Packlee

posts.description: Compare options and make clearer decisions with AI. Add your goal and options, then get structured analysis, scores, trade-offs, reasoning, and actionable suggestions to choose the best option faster without overthinking.

No credit card required.

posts.name: ShieldScan

But here’s what we keep seeing: the platform is solid. The apps and themes around it often aren’t. Old permissions. Forgotten scripts. Keys in theme files. “It was installed by the agency two years ago.” That’s why i built ShieldScan — security auditing built for Shopify, not generic website scanners.

posts.name: Everything OpenAI Codex
posts.tagline: An open-source workflow OS for OpenAI Codex.
posts.description: Open-source operating system for OpenAI Codex workflows: agents, skills, hooks, rules, memory, safety gates, and cross-harness adapters. - mturac/everything-openai-codexEOC turns raw OpenAI Codex into a maintained engineering environment: 60 agents, 230 skills, 110 rules, hook gates, session memory, and adapters for Cursor, OpenCode, Gemini, Zed, Copilot, and Trae. Not a prompt dump — a field-tested workflow system. MIT.

posts.name: NotebookLM Tools
posts.tagline: Import links, YouTube & tabs to NotebookLM
posts.description: NotebookLM is great at answering questions, but messy once you pile in dozens of notebooks and hundreds of sources. NotebookLM Tools adds the workflow layer: drag-and-drop folders, cross-notebook search, slash-command prompt library, bulk import (URLs, YouTube playlists, RSS, ZIP), inline flashcards/quizzes/slides, podcast player with downloads, tags, backups, multi-account. 35+ features. Free for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave, Arc. 80,000+ users. No signup.

posts.name: ForwardLens
posts.tagline: Talk to your finances. 13-week forecast, zero spreadsheets
posts.description: ForwardLens is an AI cash-flow copilot for small-business owners without a finance team. Connect QuickBooks or Xero. Get a live 13-week cash forecast. Ask anything in plain English: "Can I afford to hire?" "What if a client pays late?" ✓ Live 13-week forecast, updated daily ✓ Daily "you're safe" or "take action" alerts ✓ Runway countdown ✓ No finance background needed 7-day free trial, then $59.99/mo. PH launch: code PRODUCTHUNT for the first paid month free.

posts.name: ReceiptsMRR — verified Shopify revenue
posts.tagline: The public leaderboard ecom gurus can't fake.

Built for founders building credibility, buyers doing diligence, and operators selling stores at real multiples. Receipts, not screenshots.

posts.name: hidden constellation
posts.tagline: Turn your flaw into a constellation. Hear it whisper a poem.
posts.description: Hidden Constellation is a 2-minutes digital sanctuary. Step 1: Tell the night your mood — quiet, foggy, or restless. Step 2: Type a flaw you hide. Something small, something heavy. Step 3: Watch it rise into the sky, turning into a glowing constellation. A short, comforting poem appears just for you. Your flaw was never a flaw. It was a star, waiting to be seen. Zero noise. No login. Built by kinuyo.nezu

posts.name: AEOix
posts.tagline: See, fix, and grow your brand's AI search presence
posts.description: AeoIX tracks how ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, and Copilot mention your brand, cite your pages, and surface competitors, then tells you exactly what to fix. Start with a free AI visibility report, get actionable recommendations, and access a marketplace of credible publishers to boost your AEO through citations. Built for SEO agencies and B2B SaaS teams who refuse to be invisible in AI search.

posts.name: Onit: From inbox to actions
posts.tagline: Reads your inbox. Won't let you forget.

posts.name: HowTall
posts.tagline: Measure anyone's height in real time with iPhone LiDAR
posts.description: Point your iPhone Pro at someone and HowTall reads their height in real time. ARKit body-pose finds head and feet, and the LiDAR scanner projects those points onto the floor plane for an accurate measurement in cm or ft/in. Fully on-device — no accounts, no analytics, no servers. Camera and depth frames are processed in memory and discarded. Free, no IAP. Requires an iPhone with LiDAR (12 Pro or later, any Pro/Pro Max). iOS 17+.

posts.name: deckllama
posts.tagline: VCs read decks with AI. Make sure yours reads well.
posts.description: VCs drop your deck into their LLM before they ever open the file. If the AI can't answer what you do, why now, and why you, the meeting was a pass before it was scheduled. deckllama runs the same workflow on your deck and shows you exactly what the AI took away.

posts.name: RestoMap
posts.tagline: Find 40 Halal & Homemade restaurants near you — for free!
posts.description: RestoMap is a free mobile app (iOS & Android) that finds the 40 nearest restaurants near you — Halal, Homemade, Healthy, Gluten-Free & more! 🗺️ Powered by OpenStreetMap — free & open data! ✅ ALL restaurants displayed by distance ✅ No algorithm, no ads, no favouritism ✅ Missing info alerts for restaurant owners Every local restaurant gets equal visibility! 🆓 Free on App Store & Play Store

posts.name: Things Tag Manager
posts.tagline: Better Tag Manager for Things 3
posts.description: A companion app for Things 3 (Cultured Code) to make managing tags easier. Simply import your tags, and you have access to abilities not present in Things' native tag manager, like: - Searching through tags to edit and delete - Being able to see todo counts for each tag so you know which ones are actively being used - Sort tags alphabetically, by recently updated, or by todo count Mac Only.

posts.name: Conversion Radar
posts.tagline: GA4 CRO audits inside Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor
posts.description: Free open beta. No card, no limits.You know conversions are down. You don't know why. Looking for honest feedback.

posts.description: Validate any business idea with 13 specialized AI agents in minutes. Get market research, financial projections, GTM strategy, brand identity, and more. You get a viability score, pitch deck, business plan, GTM playbook, investor matching, startup valuation, and 52 tools. Free to start. No consultant needed.

posts.name: Thorax
posts.tagline: AI gym tracker for workouts, body recomp & smart routines
posts.description: Most gym apps are glorified spreadsheets. Thorax is different: → AI Coach that generates, edits & adjusts routines using real MEV/MRV science, not generic templates → Readiness score from your actual sleep, HRV & resting heart rate → ThoraxGPT: a conversational coach with full access to your training history → Interactive muscle impact maps, 200+ exercises, 30+ sports → Import from Hevy, Strong or Fitbod in 30 seconds Free on Android, iOS & web.

posts.name: DataBridge
posts.tagline: Email cleaning that shows its work
posts.description: Email cleaners always felt like a black box. Upload a list, get a number back, no idea what got tossed or why. DataBridge runs 8 validators on every address - syntax, MX, typos, role accounts, disposables, duplicates, no-reply, risky TLDs. Each rejection tells you why. Plus auto-repair: gmial.com becomes gmail.com in one click, instead of just being deleted. Saves 3-8% of typical lists. Solo founder, 8 months in. Free: 1,000 rows/month, no card. Pro: $29/mo for 100k rows.

posts.name: BlueprintX
posts.tagline: Build your AI double. Own it. Don't get erased.
posts.description: A Custom GPT chats. Your agentic VirtualTwin works. It can create branded content, search the web, speak in your voice, generate videos, and even post to LinkedIn — with more coming fast. Built through conversation. No code. It learns you the more you use it. This isn’t a chatbot with a personality. It’s you — with tools. Own it. Don’t get erased.

posts.tagline: The modern matter management OS for Migration Agents.
posts.description: Matter by Neudash is a purpose-built case management solution for Australian MARA agents. Automate client data collection, streamline document requests, and manage immigration matters securely from a single, intuitive platform.

posts.name: Prime
posts.tagline: Native, lightweight  for AI agents. Rust & Tauri v2
posts.description: Prime is a native, ultra-lightweight (5MB) desktop OS engineered for autonomous AI agents. Built with Rust and Tauri v2, it eliminates the heavy resource footprint of Electron-based tools. It features a unique 7-tier Cognitive Memory architecture, built-in support for 12+ MCP servers, an advanced Stealth Browser for computer use, and strict capability-based security. Ready for local execution with Ollama or cloud models, offering an immersive glassmorphic interface with full RTL/Arabic support.

posts.name: Yula : Subscription Tracker

posts.description: Yula is a Privacy-First app; no backend, no integration, everything runs on device.

posts.name: Sambodh IAS
posts.tagline: Find. Fix. Finish

posts.name: Zerobox
posts.tagline: Sandbox AI agents with file, network, and credential control
posts.description: Zerobox is a lightweight, cross-platform process sandboxing powered by OpenAI Codex's sandbox runtime. Single binary, no Docker, no VMs with ~10ms overhead. Zerobox offers deny by default security policy, credential injection, file access control and network filtering which lets you allow or deny outbound traffic by domain. Zerobox also offers SDKs for Rust, TypeScript, and Python with a consistent API across languages.

posts.name: Titan Memory
posts.tagline: A Persistent evolutionary memory layer for AI agents
posts.description: Titan is a persistent evolutionary memory layer for AI coding agents. The result is an agent that remembers your project, preferences, decisions, and past fixes across sessions, so you do not have to re-explain your work every time.

It also includes a free AI highlight detector and supports manual editing for full creator control.

posts.name: Harry
posts.tagline: Launch Meta ads 10x faster
posts.description: Harry cuts the time to get ads live by up to 80%. Agencies no longer need to hire additional staff or outsource just to handle more new business.

posts.name: SlapDash
posts.tagline: Slap your MacBook. It screams back.
posts.description: Ever wanted to slap your MacBook and have it scream back? SlapDash is a tiny Mac menu bar app that detects when you slap your laptop (via the built-in accelerometer) and plays a random scream. That's the whole app. Built for the moments when Slack pings won't stop, your code won't compile, or you just need to be heard. Adjustable sensitivity, custom cooldowns, bring your own sound packs. macOS 14.6+, M1 Pro or later. Free forever. Source code available if you want to peek under the hood.

posts.name: boxpdf · flow PDF layout for JS runtimes
posts.tagline: Flexbox-style PDF layout for Workers, Node, Deno, browsers
posts.description: boxpdf is a tiny PDF layout engine for Node, Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Supabase Edge, and browsers. boxpdf: a flexbox-style layout DSL on top of pdf-lib for structured programmatic PDF generation. boxpdf-html: pixel-perfect HTML/CSS renderer designed for environments where Chromium or dynamic WASM are impractical. Supports pagination, wrapping, spacing, headers/footers, images, links, tables, reusable templates, and edge-native deployment without headless Chrome.

posts.name: Crawlfix.AI
posts.tagline: Make your site easy for search and AI to trust.
posts.description: Crawlfix.ai is built for builders who shipped and got silence. It scans your site for SEO, GEO/AI search readiness, crawl and indexing issues, analytics setup, privacy/compliance gaps, and missing content opportunities. MCP, CLI, and API access are included, so agents and local workflows can plug in directly. Soon™: GitHub/CI reviews, dev logs, blog and social content generation, and localization.

posts.name: From The Bride
posts.tagline: Collect photos from your wedding guests
posts.description: Collect wedding guest photos and videos with a QR code, no app or sign-up required.

posts.name: AIToolIntel.com
posts.tagline: Independent AI tool comparisons at https://aitoolintel.com
posts.description: Compare the best AI tools side by side. Independent reviews, comparisons, and alternatives at https://aitoolintel.com

posts.name: Info Blocks Pocket
posts.tagline: The only iOS organizer that includes your contacts. Free.
posts.description: IB Pocket organizes links, files, photos, notes AND contacts by topic — something no other iOS app does. Going to a meeting? One block holds the contract, the contact, your notes, and the link. Free forever. No account. iCloud sync.

posts.name: ContentAgent
posts.tagline: AI writing in your voice. Scored before you see it.
posts.description: ContentAgent learns your voice from three interview questions and runs every generation through a quality gate that catches generic AI patterns before you see the draft. 14 templates, free to start.

posts.name: Maus
posts.tagline: The Mac clipboard manager that opens at your cursor
posts.description: Your clipboard, exactly where you need it. Multipaste, autopaste, OCR, search, custom workflows, and full customization. Free forever. Pro unlocks unlimited history for $12.99 once.

posts.name: Titan Memory
posts.tagline: A Persistent evolutionary memory layer for AI agents
posts.description: Titan is a persistent evolutionary memory layer for AI coding agents. Instead of dumping old chats into a vector search, Titan builds structured memories, links related moments, and reranks them, where memories support, contradict, and strengthen each other. The result is an agent that remembers your project, preferences, decisions, and past fixes across sessions, so you do not have to re-explain your work every time.

posts.name: SignalTabs
posts.tagline: A calm new tab workspace for people who live in tabs
posts.description: SignalTabs turns your new tab page into a calm workspace for people who live in tabs. It groups open tabs by domain, highlights duplicates, lets you save useful pages for later, and restores recently closed tabs from Archive. You can also search tabs, saved pages, bookmarks, and history from any page. Local-first, no account required.

posts.name: Ringo
posts.tagline: Put real money on your predictions — on X, Kick, and the web
posts.description: Ringo is a peer-to-peer prediction market on X, Kick, and the web. Make a claim — "ETH hits $3K", "I win this match" — put USDC behind it, and let anyone take the other side. No house, no exchange. Funds lock on-chain via smart contract (Polygon), odds shift live as orders fill, and Reality.eth settles the outcome automatically. New users get $1 USDC free instantly — no wallet setup needed to place their first prediction.

posts.name: GrantPipe
posts.tagline: Grant compliance software for nonprofits
posts.description: GrantPipe helps grant-funded nonprofits manage donor records, active grants, restricted funds, compliance deadlines, evidence, and reporting in one workspace, without rebuilding the operation around spreadsheets or a custom Salesforce setup.

posts.name: Online Notepad
posts.tagline: Free, private notepad. No account, no cloud, no fuss.
posts.description: A free notepad that opens faster than your notes app finishes loading. No account. No cloud. No tracking. Your notes stay in your browser, work offline, and never touch a server. ✅ Simple editor for fast capture ✅ Advanced editor with formatting ✅ Built-in to do list with reminders ✅ Works offline once loaded ✅ Zero sign-up, zero friction Ad-supported and free forever. The notepad the internet forgot to overcomplicate.

posts.name: ComplianceCheckup
posts.tagline: GDPR and privacy compliance scanner for any website.
posts.description: Grade your website's privacy in 30 seconds. Free score on GDPR, CCPA, security headers, cookie consent, and more. Also contains compliance checklists to help companies get their compliance in order.

posts.name: Pulsarpay
posts.tagline: Developer Tools, API, Artificial Intelligence
posts.description: Hey Product Hunt 👋 Pulsarpay is a pre-funded payment layer for APIs and services. Users load their balance once, authorize services via API key, and every request is charged and settled in real time, on Solana USDC. For providers: integrate once, charge per request, withdraw on demand. No subscriptions, no failed payments. For users: fund once, pay only for what you use. Live and stable. Would love feedback from devs building APIs or AI tools 🙌

posts.name: BHPgen.pl

posts.description: BHPGen automates Polish workplace safety documentation (BHP). Employers type a job title — AI generates a complete instruction compliant with § 41 Polish labour regulation in 30 seconds. Replace hours of manual paperwork with one click.

posts.tagline: Mortgage decision engine for smarter home buying
posts.description: A smarter mortgage experience for borrowers and brokers. Mortgage Decision Engine combines affordability analysis, DTI insights, buyer profiling, approval probability, and interactive what-if simulations into one guided experience. Instead of just showing a payment, it helps users understand whether they’re financially ready to buy a home.

posts.name: LivingDocs
posts.tagline: Claude writes your docs to .md files, right in your repo
posts.description: LivingDocs is an MCP server that indexes your codebase with BM25 + Claude embeddings — queryable from Claude Desktop, VS Code Copilot, and any MCP client. The write_docs Pro tool generates documentation for every symbol in a file and appends it to docs/.md with a UTC timestamp. No Confluence, no wiki, no OAuth. Docs stay in git, travel with branches, get reviewed in PRs — and since they're plain markdown, Claude reads them directly when you ask questions about your repo.

posts.name: FiberView Pro

Purpose-built for real field work. No fluff, no clutter. Just the tools you need on every job.

posts.name: Toll
posts.tagline: An app blocker where ads are the punishment
posts.description: Most app blockers have an easy off switch, but Toll doesn't. Instead of locking you out, it makes you watch an ad every time you open a blocked app (nobody likes ads!) It's like toll booth - you can always get in, it just costs you 30-60 seconds first. Annoying enough to make you pause, not so annoying you'll uninstall it. Free to use too!

posts.name: Luca Map
posts.tagline: Your walks, but make them a map you're slowly coloring in.
posts.description: LucaMap paints in the streets you've actually walked. That's it. That's the app. But somehow seeing your map fill in does something weird to your brain — you start taking the long way home. You wander into the next neighborhood "just to check." You walk an extra block because the corner isn't colored yet. It's basically a coloring book for grown-ups who forgot how fun it is to go outside for no reason.

posts.tagline: Fix your bad pixel art and make it game-ready

It is designed for the practical parts of pixel-art production: cleaning up sprites, icons, tiles, character sheets, concept art, and other game assets so they are easier to use in real projects. Use PixelAid the way you want. It's open source and FREE!

posts.name: Smartshelf
posts.tagline: Turn your retail products into smart inventory in seconds
posts.description: Smartshelf helps gas stations, convenience stores, liquor stores, and many other small retail take control of inventory. Scan products, track stock, get low stock alerts.

posts.name: Luca Map
posts.tagline: Your walks, but make them a map you're slowly coloring in.
posts.description: LucaMap paints in the streets you've actually walked. That's it. That's the app. But somehow seeing your map fill in does something weird to your brain — you start taking the long way home. You wander into the next neighborhood "just to check." You walk an extra block because the corner isn't colored yet. It's basically a coloring book for grown-ups who forgot how fun it is to go outside for no reason.

posts.name: Twichat
posts.tagline: #startup #twichat #entertainment #platform
posts.description: twichat.xyz is a random video chat platform where you meet strangers worldwide matched by your actual interests like Gaming, Music, Travel & Tech. Unlike Omegle, we give you control over who you meet. Plus a built-in Tic-Tac-Toe to break the ice instantly. No account needed. Just click, match, and connect. Built by two brothers who wanted real conversations on the internet again.

posts.name: Huddle
posts.tagline: Quick decision making and fun selection
posts.description: We all know the struggle: 6 friends, 10 restaurant options, 3 different “I’m free at…” texts. I built a tiny web app called Huddle that fixes this: One person adds a few times + places Shares a link (works in any chat) Everyone taps/swipes yes/no App instantly picks the best option No accounts. No download even — it’s a mobile web app. Try it with your group and let me know if it actually saves you from the endless “what about…” messages..

posts.name: Motocare: Car maintenance assistant
posts.tagline: Track fuel, service, and vehicle costs with reminders
posts.description: MotoCare is a personal vehicle care app for tracking fuel, maintenance, expenses, reminders, and vehicle readiness. It stands out by combining practical logs with clear insights, helping car and motorcycle owners understand costs, service needs, and driving patterns in one place.

posts.name: Testably
posts.tagline: QA test management with built-in Playwright + Cypress sync
posts.description: Testably is the QA test management platform for CI-first teams — with first-party Playwright + Cypress reporters built in. Add the reporter to your config, set 3 env vars, and every CI run auto-syncs to Testably (status, failures, timing). No manual uploads, no custom scripts. AI generates test cases from requirements, runs risk analysis, and writes run summaries. Jira/GitHub sync. Import from TestRail in minutes. Free plan, no per-seat pricing.

posts.name: FlowCast
posts.tagline: Know exactly where your cash is going
posts.description: FlowCast is a free cash flow forecasting tool built for small business owners who don't have a CFO or accountant. Answer four simple questions and get a 6-month forecast with visual charts, a cash runway indicator, and plain-English AI insights. Save and compare multiple scenarios, then export a professional PDF or Excel workbook to share with your bank or accountant. No subscription. No credit card. Always free. Built for retail, e-com. Freelancers and service businesses with 1–20 employees.

posts.name: The Euro System as a (19,9,3,3)-System
posts.tagline: Open-source framework for cryptography & data analysis
posts.description: The entire system can be written as a single formula: N = 19A + 9B + 3C + 3D where A, B, C, D count the denominations in each layer. The coefficients 19, 9, 3, 3 are not arbitrary — they satisfy 19 ≡ 1 (mod 9), and each divides the next. For any amount N (in units of €0.10), the minimal starting value is always: A₀ = N mod 9 Computed in O(1).
